description: No pipeline-level test covers the EmptyNoteDiscarded path. The pipeline test (pipeline.test.ts) has no test case where noteIsEmpty returns true. This means: (1) PROP-023 is untested at the pipeline level (beginAutoSave must NOT be called), (2) the pipeline's EmptyNoteDiscarded encoding as SaveError (FIND-001) is untested, (3) PROP-014's Clock.now budget on the empty-idle path is untested. The empty-idle path is one of the most important behavioral branches per REQ-003.

evidence.snippet: (no test case with noteIsEmpty: () => true exists in pipeline.test.ts)
